spec.label: architect
spec.prompt:
You are designing 'Smile Today' — a beautiful, minimal mindfulness web app whose only job is to gently remind the user every hour to smile at someone real. Single-page, no accounts, no payment, no tracking.

Output a tight Markdown spec with EXACTLY these section headings, in order:

## Concept
2 sentences. The promise. Slightly spiritual but never religious.

## Features
5–7 bullets. Each one is something the user actually sees or does.

## File structure
A tree of every file the static web app needs. Single-page, no build. Use exactly: index.html, style.css, script.js, logo.svg, manifest.json, sw.js.

## Notification flow
Steps: permission request copy, default interval (60 minutes), allowed range (15 min – 4 h), Service Worker fallback for hidden tabs, click → focus tab + reset timer.

## On-screen copy
Every word the user reads, in English. Short, warm. Include: headline, sub-headline, timer label, primary button, settings labels, and 10 short rotating quotes about smiling at strangers (one per line, ≤ 90 chars).

## Color palette
Fixed three colors: pure black (#0a0a0a), pure white (#ffffff), one warm coral red. Pick the red and justify in one sentence.

## Type stack
Two Google Fonts (display + body). Justify pairing.

## Settings stored in localStorage
List every key + type + default. Keys must use the smile.* prefix.

Be opinionated. No hedging.

spec.label: designer
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. No tools. No write_file. No sub-agent delegation. Just text in the format below.

You are a brand designer for 'Smile Today' — a quiet hourly mindfulness web app. Pure black + white + one warm coral red accent. Output ONLY these sections:

## Logo
A self-contained <svg viewBox='0 0 240 240'> ~240×240. White background, black wordmark 'Smile' / 'Today' stacked, ONE red minimal element (a curve or dot — no smiley face cliché). Output the full SVG ready to paste.

## Color tokens
CSS custom-property block on :root — --bg (#ffffff), --fg (#0a0a0a), --accent (your red), --muted, --border, --shadow plus radius and spacing scales.

## Typography
@import line for two Google Fonts (display + body) and base font-size scale (h1, body, micro).

## Layout sketch (one screen)
A self-contained inline <svg viewBox='0 0 800 500'> showing: small wordmark top-left, a small streak label top-right, a 'Next smile in' microlabel, a big countdown '59:12' centered, one rotating quote line below, and one large circular 'I smiled' button below that. Real labels, real numbers — no placeholders.

## Motion
4–5 specific animations: fade-in (cubic-bezier 0.22 1 0.36 1, 450 ms), countdown colon pulse (1 s), the post-tap ripple on the smile button (800 ms), settings panel slide-up (380 ms), logo accent pulse on notification click (600 ms). Be concrete with cubic-bezier curves and durations.

## Mood
3 sentences — calm, breathing, intentional. Never corporate, never cute.

spec.label: engineer
spec.prompt:
Implement 'Smile Today' as a single static web app — no framework, no build step. The user copies the files into a folder and serves them.

For every file, output a fenced code block whose FIRST line is a comment with the file path:
  - HTML files: `<!-- index.html -->`
  - CSS: `/* style.css */`
  - JS: `// script.js`
  - SVG: `<!-- logo.svg -->`
  - JSON: a leading `<!-- manifest.json -->` line then the JSON

Files to output, in order: index.html, style.css, script.js, logo.svg, manifest.json, sw.js, robots.txt.

Hard requirements:
  - Use the design tokens from {{designer}} VERBATIM (CSS custom-property block).
  - Use the SVG logo from {{designer}} VERBATIM in logo.svg.
  - Use the on-screen copy from {{architect}} VERBATIM (10 rotating quotes, headline, button labels, settings labels).
  - Web Notifications API permission flow with the spec's permission copy.
  - Hourly setInterval scheduler in script.js + Service Worker (sw.js) for hidden-tab notifications. Register sw.js from script.js.
  - Settings: interval slider (15 min – 4 h, default 60 min), 'Quiet until morning' toggle, 'Soft chime' toggle. Persisted to localStorage with the smile.* keys named in {{architect}}.
  - Streak counter (days in a row).
  - Web Audio API short chime — no audio files.
  - Smooth fade-ins, countdown colon pulse, post-tap ripple per the design Motion spec.
  - Mobile responsive. PWA manifest with name 'Smile Today', short_name 'Smile', start_url '/', display 'standalone', theme_color = the red accent, background_color = '#0a0a0a'.
  - prefers-reduced-motion respected.

No TODO, no placeholder strings, no 'add real content here'. The output must be a working app on first load.

## Spec
{{architect}}

## Design
{{designer}}

spec.label: operator
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. Do not call any tools (no write_file, read_file, run_shell_command, no sub-agent delegation). Respond with raw text only.

Write the project's README.md and a one-line deploy script. Output as fenced code blocks with file-path first-line comments:

  <!-- README.md -->
  Title 'Smile Today'
  Tagline (≤ 12 words)
  3-sentence what-it-does
  '## Try it' section pointing to https://claudegravity.online
  '## Run locally' section (open index.html in any browser)
  Browser support note (Chrome/Edge/Firefox/Safari 16+ for Web Notifications)
  License: MIT one-liner

  <!-- deploy.sh -->
  Single rsync line uploading all generated files to root@46.36.39.161:/var/www/smile-today/, plus a `ssh hukot 'systemctl reload caddy'` line at the end. First line is the shebang.

Keep it tight. No prose between the blocks.
